description: Explanatory descriptors for contextual tags in the hazcat. Tags document controls and context that may affect qualification depth and test inclusion per FDA QSMR and ISO 13485. Note: Equipment-type-specific controls are now in equipment_controls_catalog.json (Site tab). Hazard-specific context options are in hazard_context_options.json (Hazards tab).

tags.Load type wrapped: Product/load is wrapped (e.g., wrapped trays). Affects worst-case load selection for sterilization mapping.
tags.Load type tray: Product/load is in trays. Affects chamber mapping and BI placement.
tags.Load type porous: Porous loads (e.g., textiles, kits). Require extended cycles and air removal verification per ISO 17665.
tags.Load density high: Dense load configuration. May require extended cycle or focused mapping.
tags.Thermocouple mapping yes: Thermocouple mapping performed. Supports cycle validation and cold-spot identification.
tags.Biological indicator program yes: Routine BI program in place. Per ISO 11138/11137; required for sterilization validation.
tags.BI program yes: Biological indicator program active. Supports sterility assurance.
tags.FAT available yes: Factory Acceptance Test report available. Supports IQ documentation.
tags.Bowie-Dick testing yes: Bowie-Dick or air removal test performed. Required for pre-vacuum sterilizers per ISO 11140-4.
tags.Vacuum pump redundancy yes: Redundant vacuum pump(s). Reduces air removal failure risk.
tags.Valve maintenance monthly: Valve maintenance on monthly schedule. Supports vacuum reliability.
tags.Sterilant EtO: Ethylene oxide used as sterilant. Requires aeration and residual verification.
tags.Aeration validated yes: Aeration process validated. Required for EtO and H2O2 sterilization.
tags.Packaging porous: Porous packaging. Affects gas penetration and cycle parameters.
tags.Residual testing performed: Residual sterilant testing performed. Required for EtO and H2O2 per 21 CFR 820.
tags.Dosimetry program yes: Dosimetry program for radiation sterilization. Required per ISO 11137.
tags.Conveyor automation yes: Automated conveyor. Affects dose uniformity mapping.
tags.Packaging density high: High packaging density. Affects dose distribution.
tags.Packaging geometry sensitive: Geometry affects dose distribution. Requires worst-case mapping.
tags.Accelerator maintenance schedule: Accelerator maintenance documented. Supports e-beam reliability.
tags.Material compatibility check required: Material compatibility must be verified. Per H2O2 and EtO sterilization.
tags.Continuous logging yes: Continuous temperature or parameter logging. Supports excursion detection per 21 CFR 820.
tags.Backup power yes: Backup power (UPS or generator) available. Reduces power-loss risk for cold chain.
tags.Door alarm present: Door-open alarm installed. Supports cold chain integrity.
tags.Alarm escalation present: Alarm escalation to on-call or remote notification. Enhances cold chain monitoring.
tags.Alarm remote notification yes: Remote alarm notification enabled. Required for critical cold chain per USP.
tags.Airlock present: Airlock or anteroom present. Reduces door-open impact on cold storage.
tags.High traffic area: High foot traffic. May increase door-open events; affects monitoring strategy.
tags.Oxygen monitoring present: Oxygen monitoring for LN2 storage. Required for cryogenic safety.
tags.PPE required yes: PPE required for operation. Safety control for hazardous materials.
tags.Automated filling no: Manual or semi-automated filling. Affects contamination risk and qualification depth.
tags.Vision inspection yes: Vision inspection system present. May add OQ/PQ tests.
tags.Material compatibility verified: Material compatibility verified. Supports seal integrity.
tags.Operator training required: Operator training program in place. Per 21 CFR 820.25.
tags.Parameter validation yes: Process parameters validated. Supports seal quality.
tags.In-line testing present: In-line testing (e.g., checkweigher, vision). May require verification in OQ/PQ.
tags.Checkweigher present: Checkweigher in line. Requires accuracy and repeatability verification.
tags.Clean-in-place available: CIP capability. Affects cleaning validation scope.
tags.Tooling maintenance schedule: Tooling maintenance documented. Supports process consistency.
tags.Serialization enabled: Serialization system active. Per DSCSA and traceability requirements.
tags.Vision verification present: Vision-based verification. Requires algorithm and detection verification.
tags.Database reconciliation: Database reconciliation performed. Per 21 CFR Part 11.
tags.Draft shield present: Draft shield on balance. Reduces environmental impact.
tags.Temperature control yes: Temperature control for balance area. Supports repeatability.
tags.Probe calibration monthly: Probe calibration on monthly schedule. Supports metrology accuracy.
tags.Fixture verification yes: Fixture verification performed. Supports measurement uncertainty.
tags.Controlled storage yes: Controlled storage for gauges. Per ISO 17025.
tags.Calibration schedule: Calibration schedule in place. Supports measurement validity.
tags.Lighting control yes: Lighting control for vision system. Affects detection consistency.
tags.Fixture verification present: Fixture verification documented. Supports dimensional accuracy.
tags.System suitability enforced: System suitability testing required. Per USP and 21 CFR 820.
tags.Column maintenance schedule: Column maintenance documented. Supports HPLC performance.
tags.Calibration standards present: Calibration standards available. Supports accuracy verification.
tags.Lamp maintenance schedule: Lamp maintenance documented. Supports UV-Vis performance.
tags.Reagent lot control: Reagent lot control in place. Per 21 CFR 820.70.
tags.Apparatus calibration schedule: Apparatus calibration documented. Supports dissolution accuracy.
tags.Method suitability enforced: Method suitability enforced. Per USP and validation.
tags.QC program enforced: QC program in place. Per 21 CFR 820.80.
tags.Interference checks present: Interference checks performed. Supports immunoassay accuracy.
tags.Environmental control recommended: Environmental control recommended. For POC and PCR.
tags.Dedicated pre/post-PCR areas: Dedicated PCR areas. Reduces contamination risk per molecular methods.
tags.Negative controls enforced: Negative controls used. Required for PCR validation.
tags.SPC enforced: Statistical process control in place. Per 21 CFR 820.75.
tags.Mold maintenance schedule: Mold maintenance documented. Supports injection molding consistency.
tags.Material lot control: Material lot control in place. Per 21 CFR 820.80.
tags.Tool monitoring present: Tool wear or monitoring. Supports CNC/machining consistency.
tags.Safety PLC present: Safety PLC in place. Per ISO 13849 for robotics.
tags.Interlocks enforced: Safety interlocks documented. Required for automated equipment.
tags.Torque audit present: Torque audit trail or verification. Supports assembly traceability.
tags.Tool calibration schedule: Torque tool calibration documented. Per 21 CFR 820.72.
tags.Algorithm validation present: Inspection algorithm validated. Supports vision detection.
tags.Audit sampling enforced: Audit sampling in place. Supports inspection verification.
tags.Detergent dosing control: Detergent dosing controlled. Supports washer-disinfector validation.
tags.Microbial monitoring present: Microbial monitoring in place. Supports cleaning efficacy.
tags.Solution concentration control: Solution concentration controlled. Supports ultrasonic cleaning.
tags.Loading SOP present: Loading SOP documented. Supports cleaning consistency.
tags.Verification sampling recommended: Verification sampling recommended for manual processes.
tags.Pull test sampling: Pull or tensile test sampling for joint verification.
tags.Dispense pump monitoring: Dispense pump monitored. Supports adhesive/crimp consistency.
tags.Cure profile validation: Cure profile validated. Supports adhesive bonding.
tags.Bond strength sampling: Bond strength sampling for assembly verification.
tags.Redundant AHU present: Redundant air handling unit. Reduces HVAC failure risk.
tags.Particle monitoring yes: Particle monitoring in place. Per ISO 14644.
tags.Pressure control enforced: Pressure differential control. Required for cleanrooms.
tags.HEPA integrity testing: HEPA integrity testing performed. Per ISO 14644-3.
tags.TOC monitoring present: TOC monitoring for water. Supports PW/WFI quality.
tags.Point-of-use filters: Point-of-use filters. Supports water quality at use points.
tags.Dew point monitoring present: Dew point monitoring. Supports compressed air quality.
tags.Oil coalescing filters: Oil coalescing filters. Supports instrument air quality.
tags.Redundant dryers: Redundant dryers. Supports compressed air dew point.
